svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ChatGPT" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="salondenature-architecture" name="SalonDeNature Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1664" dy="1065" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1F2937;" value="SalonDeNature Management System Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="130" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clientLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EEF2FF;strokeColor=#6366F1;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Client Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="660" x="120" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="customer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#A5B4FC;fontSize=13;" value="Customer<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Reservation / My Booking</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="165" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#A5B4FC;fontSize=13;" value="Staff<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Assigned Bookings</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="375" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="admin" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#A5B4FC;fontSize=13;" value="Admin<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Calendar / Dashboard</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="150" x="585" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="presentationLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFDF5;strokeColor=#10B981;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Presentation Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="95" width="480" x="210" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="web" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#6EE7B7;fontSize=13;" value="SalonDeNature Web Application<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Jinja Templates / CSS / Browser UI</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="290" x="305" y="285" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="appLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Application Layer - Flask Blueprints" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="720" x="90" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flask" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#FDBA74;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;" value="Flask Application<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">App Factory / Routing / Session</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="240" x="330" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auth" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#FDBA74;fontSize=12;" value="Authentication<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Local / Kakao / Google OAuth</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="125" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="booking" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#FDBA74;fontSize=12;" value="Booking<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">CRUD / Reschedule</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="285" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="staffMgmt" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#FDBA74;fontSize=12;" value="Staff Management<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Schedule / Time-off / Profile</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="445" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="adminDash" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#FDBA74;fontSize=12;" value="Admin Dashboard<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">Calendar / Customer / Revenue</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="140" x="605" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="logicLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FDF2F8;strokeColor=#EC4899;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Business Logic" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="145" width="660" x="120" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="validation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F9A8D4;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" value="Availability Validation<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">prevents duplicated reservations</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="230" x="335" y="695" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="workHours" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F9A8D4;fontSize=11;" value="Working Hours" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="130" x="160" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="timeOff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F9A8D4;fontSize=11;" value="Time-off Check" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="130" x="310" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="overlap" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F9A8D4;fontSize=11;" value="Booking Overlap" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="130" x="460" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="duration" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#F9A8D4;fontSize=11;" value="Service Duration" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="130" x="610" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dataLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F0FDFA;strokeColor=#14B8A6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Persistence Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="480" x="210" y="845" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3d;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#5EEAD4;fontSize=13;" value="SQLite Database<br><font style="font-size: 11px;">SQLAlchemy ORM / Flask-Migrate</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="230" x="335" y="885" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="domainLayer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8FAFC;strokeColor=#64748B;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=14;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="Domain Models" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="660" x="120" y="985" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="models" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#CBD5E1;fontSize=12;" value="Customer · Booking · Staff · Service · StaffSchedule · StaffTimeOff · SmsLog · ShopSettings" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="580" x="160" y="1020" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="external" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEFCE8;strokeColor=#EAB308;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="External APIs" vertex="1">
